lines.speaker: Natural Historian
lines.text: I've lost my notes... Duffy, have you seen my notes?

lines.speaker: Natural Historian
lines.text: My wife will kill me if I don't take her back a souvenir.

lines.speaker: Natural Historian
lines.text: I've had such a terrible headache since we arrived on this mountain.

lines.speaker: Natural Historian
lines.text: Thank Saradomin for that mountain guide. We couldn't have made it here without him!

lines.speaker: Natural Historian
lines.text: I can't find my rock pick!
